description: Business object representing an uploaded document with metadata

properties.name: fileName
properties.description: Original name of the uploaded file

properties.name: fileSize
properties.description: Size of the file in bytes

properties.name: documentType
properties.description: Type of document selected by user (e.g., invoice, contract, report)

properties.name: fileContent
properties.description: Base64 encoded file content for storage in LocalStore

properties.name: uploadedAt
properties.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was uploaded

properties.name: uploaded
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the document has been uploaded to LocalStore
